summary: Reposted local television news segment. The frame is a split layout: at left, a candid photo of a smiling teenage boy in a dark t-shirt outdoors, with two separate booking-style mugshot photos of young men beneath it; at right, a still of a house exterior with a white pickup truck parked outside, overlaid with a date stamp 'MARCH 12, 2026' and a line of text about a 2025 homicide case. A lower-third chyron reads 'SECOND SUSPECT CHARGED IN TEEN'S DEATH' with 'GREENE COUNTY, MO' beneath it. A reposter watermark 'Unlimited_LS' is centered. The audio is a reporter describing prosecutors charging another man in the killing of a 15-year-old. No music bed.

script.scene: Split screen: smiling teen boy photo and two mugshots at left; house exterior with white pickup and date stamp 'MARCH 12, 2026' at right; chyron 'SECOND SUSPECT CHARGED IN TEEN'S DEATH / GREENE COUNTY, MO.'
